name: lie_best_fit_v3_similarity_optflow
description: Best-fit parameters for the Lie (Li et al. 2020, BIT27491) deformation benchmark using similarity-based anchor alignment (Fig. 5a), a slit-sealed smoothed t=0 polygon, and a DIC-like optical-flow experimental dx(t) extraction. NOTE: these are effective poroelastic surrogate parameters (not the Oldroyd-B PF parameters from Li et al.).

fit_metrics.notes: Metrics computed by examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/compare_exp_sim_timeseries_dx.py with --smooth-exp 5. Relative error uses the paper's 'every second datum' convention as implemented in the script.

repro_command: conda run --no-capture-output -n fenicsx python -u examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/lie_synthetic_deformation_one_domain.py --backend cpp --transport-mode pde --alpha-advection-form conservative --alpha-ch-M 1e-12 --alpha-ch-gamma 2e-3 --D-alpha 0 --alpha0-kind polygon --alpha0-file examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/biofilm_exp_s1_frame0_polygon_mm_similarity_smooth.csv --alpha0-scale 1e-3 --alpha0-align block --mu-b-model mu --mu-b-fluid 1e-3 --solid-model linear --G-b 1.20536e-4 --mu-b 3e-2 --kappa-inv 1e8 --u-avg 6e-4 --t-ramp 8 --dt 1.0 --t-final 20 --newton-tol 1e-5 --max-it 15 --snes-accept-factor 5 --allow-dt-reduction --dt-min 0.2 --dt-reduction-factor 0.5 --stop-on-steady --steady-tol 1e-11 --restrict-skeleton-alpha-min 0.01 --nx 60 --ny 30 --nx-left 21 --nx-mid 18 --nx-right 21 --ny-bottom 6 --ny-top 24 --q 6 --vtk-every 0 --dx-intersection leftmost --out-dir out/_lie_best_fit_v3_similarity_optflow
